meta.description: AI orchestration desktop app — multi-project chat, agent monitoring, skills management, and provider configuration. Built with Tauri + Rust + React.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Project setup, architecture, core Rust backend, and app shell layout

phases.name: Core Chat
phases.description: AI chat with streaming, multi-session, project context, and auto-title generation

milestones.title: Project context — attach folder, file tree
Rich chat rendering (markdown, code blocks, syntax highlight)

phases.name: Orchestration
phases.description: Agent monitoring, skills manager, usage metrics, right sidebar panels

milestones.title: Agent monitor panel (list, status, duration, cancel)
Usage metrics panel (tokens in/out, cost estimate, latency)

phases.name: Polish & MVP Release
phases.description: UX polish, error handling, onboarding, and v0.1.0 release

tasks.title: Project context — attach folder
tasks.description: User picks a folder, Tauri reads file tree. Selected files injected into system prompt as context.

tasks.title: Auto-title generation
tasks.description: After 2nd user message, inject prompt asking LLM to generate a short session title. Update header.

tasks.title: Tauri + React + TS boilerplate
tasks.description: Initial project scaffold with Vite, React 19, TypeScript strict, Tauri 2.

tasks.title: CSS Grid app shell
tasks.description: 3-panel layout: left sidebar (220px) | center (flex) | right sidebar (280px), with header + chat + footer in center column.

tasks.title: Rust backend structure
tasks.description: Create commands/, services/, models/, state/, error.rs. AppError with thiserror, AppState with SQLite pool.

tasks.title: SQLite setup + migrations
tasks.description: Add sqlx with SQLite, create migrations for projects, sessions, messages, providers, agent_runs tables.

tasks.title: Zustand store structure
tasks.description: Define stores: useProjectStore, useSessionStore, useChatStore, useSettingsStore, useAgentStore.

tasks.title: Left sidebar UI
tasks.description: Project switcher dropdown, session list per project, new session button, settings button at bottom.

tasks.title: LLM provider abstraction (Rust)
tasks.description: Define Provider trait: stream_chat(), list_models(), validate_key(). Implement for custom provider first.

tasks.title: Streaming chat via Tauri events
tasks.description: Rust streams LLM tokens, emits Tauri events per chunk. Frontend listens and appends to chat bubble in real-time.

tasks.title: Multi-session management
tasks.description: Create, switch, rename, delete sessions scoped to a project. Persist to SQLite.

tasks.title: Rich chat rendering
tasks.description: Markdown with react-markdown, syntax highlighting via shiki, copy button on code blocks.

tasks.title: Agent monitor panel
tasks.description: Right sidebar tab: active/completed agents, status badge, duration, output preview, cancel button.

tasks.title: Skills manager panel
tasks.description: Right sidebar tab: list skills from .claude/skills/, toggle active/inactive, view SKILL.md content.

tasks.title: Usage metrics panel
tasks.description: Right sidebar tab: tokens in/out, estimated cost, avg latency per session. Data from SQLite.

tasks.title: Provider & model settings
tasks.description: Settings page: add/edit providers (name, base URL, API key), select default model, test connection.

tasks.title: Onboarding flow
tasks.description: First-run wizard: welcome screen, API key input, provider selection, test connection, done.

tasks.title: Error & empty states
tasks.description: Empty chat, failed API error toast, no sessions/projects states — all with clear CTAs.

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcuts
tasks.description: Cmd+N new session, Cmd+K command palette, Cmd+Enter send message, Escape cancel.

features.name: AI Chat + Streaming
features.description: Real-time streaming chat with LLM, token-by-token rendering

features.name: Multi-Session
features.description: Create, switch, rename, delete sessions scoped to projects

features.name: Multi-Project
features.description: Load multiple projects, switch via dropdown in left sidebar

features.name: Project Context
features.description: Attach folder/files to session, inject file tree into system prompt

features.name: Rich Chat Rendering
features.description: Markdown, syntax-highlighted code blocks, copy button

features.name: Auto-Title Generation
features.description: LLM generates session title after 2nd message, shown in header

features.name: Agent Monitoring
features.description: Right panel: list active/completed agents, status, duration, cancel

features.name: Skills Manager
features.description: Browse skills from .claude/skills/, toggle active, view SKILL.md

features.name: Usage Metrics
features.description: Tokens in/out, cost estimate, latency per session

features.name: Provider Settings
features.description: Add/edit LLM providers: name, base URL, API key, default model

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: First-run wizard for API key and provider setup

features.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+Enter, Escape for common actions

features.name: App Shell Layout
features.description: CSS Grid 3-panel: left sidebar, center chat, right panel + footer

suggestions.title: Command palette (Cmd+K)
suggestions.description: Fuzzy-search across sessions, projects, commands, and skills. Faster navigation than clicking through sidebar.

suggestions.title: Prompt templates library
suggestions.description: Save and reuse common prompts with variables like {{filename}}. Accessible from chat input.

suggestions.title: Diff viewer for AI code changes
suggestions.description: When AI suggests code changes, show side-by-side diff before applying. Reduces accidental overwrites.

suggestions.title: Export session as markdown
suggestions.description: Export full chat history as a clean .md file. Useful for documentation and sharing.

suggestions.title: Multi-model comparison
suggestions.description: Send same prompt to 2-3 models simultaneously, compare responses side by side.

suggestions.title: Local model support (Ollama)
suggestions.description: Connect to Ollama for fully offline AI. Same Provider trait, just different base_url.

decisions.title: Tauri over Electron
decisions.rationale: ~10MB bundle vs ~150MB, Rust backend for safety and performance, native OS integration without Node.js overhead.

decisions.title: Direct LLM API (no middleware)
decisions.rationale: Simpler architecture, lower latency, full control. Custom provider prioritized, others added via same trait.

decisions.title: Streaming via Tauri events (not SSE)
decisions.rationale: Tauri's event system is more reliable for desktop IPC. Rust emits per-token events, React listens with listen().

decisions.title: Zustand for frontend state
decisions.rationale: Lightweight, no boilerplate, works well with React 19. Separate stores per domain.

decisions.title: SQLite via sqlx for persistence
decisions.rationale: Embedded, no server, async support, compile-time query checking. Stores all app data.

decisions.title: CSS Grid for app shell
decisions.rationale: 3-panel layout is simple enough for native CSS Grid. No dependency on docking libraries for MVP.

decisions.title: Provider trait abstraction in Rust
decisions.rationale: Pluggable LLM backends via Rust trait. Custom provider first, then Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama via same interface.

patterns.name: Commands as thin wrappers
patterns.description: Tauri commands only validate input and call services. No business logic in command layer.

patterns.name: Services layer (no Tauri imports)
patterns.description: All business logic in src-tauri/src/services/. Fully testable without Tauri runtime.

patterns.name: Streaming via emit()
patterns.description: LLM tokens streamed via app.emit('chat-token', payload). Frontend subscribes with listen('chat-token', cb).

patterns.name: Separate Zustand stores per domain
patterns.description: useProjectStore, useSessionStore, useChatStore, useSettingsStore, useAgentStore — no god store.

patterns.name: AppError unified enum
patterns.description: All Rust errors funnel through AppError with thiserror. Serialized to frontend as { kind, message }.

sessionLog.details: git-master, enowx-rust, plan-visualizer skills added to .claude/skills/
Auto-trigger rules for 5 skills added to project root
Brainstorming session: 4 phases, 18 tasks, 13 features, 6 suggestions, 7 architecture decisions

sessionLog.summary: Full MVP implemented: Rust backend (commands/services/models/migrations), streaming chat, 5 Zustand stores, CSS Grid app shell, ChatPanel/ChatMessage/ChatInput/StreamingMessage, ProviderSettings, OnboardingWizard, keyboard shortcuts. Build clean, committed.
